info.name: DummyJSON API Testing - QA Portfolio
info.description: Postman collection for QA portfolio. Covers products, carts, users, and negative API testing.

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response time is less than 2000ms', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });
pm.test('Response has products array', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('products'); pm.expect(json.products).to.be.an('array'); });

pm.test('First product has required fields', function () { const product = pm.response.json().products[0]; pm.expect(product).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(product).to.have.property('title'); pm.expect(product).to.have.property('price'); });

item.name: Products - Get product by valid ID

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Product id is 1', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.id).to.eql(1); });
pm.test('Product has title and price', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.title).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(json.price).to.be.a('number'); });

item.name: Products - Get product by invalid ID

exec: pm.test('Status code is 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('Error message exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(JSON.stringify(json).length).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response has products array', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.products).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Search returns at least one result or valid empty array', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.products).to.not.be.undefined; });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response has carts array', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.carts).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: Carts - Get cart by valid ID

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Cart id is 1', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.id).to.eql(1); });
pm.test('Cart contains products array', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.products).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Response has products', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.products).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Response has userId', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.userId).to.eql(1); });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response has users array', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.users).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: Users - Get user by valid ID

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('User id is 1', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.id).to.eql(1); });
pm.test('User has name data', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.firstName).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(json.lastName).to.be.a('string'); });
pm.test('Status code is 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('Response body exists', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text().length).to.be.above(0); });
